methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $1.5B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 9 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $600M - $4.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 7.8x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.name: Ultima Genomics

private.name: Insitro
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series C), post-money $2.4B

data.narrative:
Colossal Biosciences is a Series C-stage biotech company founded by Ben Lamm and George Church, currently valued at $1.5B post-money following $435M in total capital raised. The valuation analysis draws from a comparable universe of 9 private-stage peers in the Biotech & Health sector, including Ultima Genomics ($4.0B), Insitro ($2.4B), and HistoSonics ($2.2B), alongside 3 public comparables (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L).

Two methods applied across this dataset produced convergent results. Stage-progression analysis, applying a 1.7x multiplier typical of Series C advancement, yields $2.5B. Peer-median methodology across 9 same-sector and adjacent-stage companies produces $1.8B, with the full peer range spanning $600M to $4.0B. Public-comp anchoring using a sector P/S median of 7.8x was not applicable due to unavailable revenue data for the private target.

The triangulated valuation range spans $1.5B (low) to $2.9B (high), with a median of $2.2B. The current $1.5B valuation aligns with the low end of this range, suggesting modest upside potential through Series D. Key uncertainties include the absence of revenue disclosure, which precludes P/S multiple validation, and the wide dispersion across peer valuations ($600M–$4.0B), reflecting stage and business-model heterogeneity within frontier biotech.
